common.tagline: Dixon–Coles model probabilities, shown alongside market odds
common.experimentalTooltip: This model is experimental. Closing market odds are usually the most accurate; the model is shown alongside the market for comparison only, not as betting advice.

home.heroSubtitle: Probabilities from World Football Elo + Dixon–Coles, shown alongside market odds.
home.disclaimerBanner: Experimental model. Shown alongside market odds for comparison only — not betting advice.
home.cardMatchesDesc: 1X2, over/under, BTTS and upset risk, alongside market odds.
home.cardGroupsDesc: Monte Carlo simulation of 72 group games, per-team advancement probabilities.
home.cardValueDesc: Enter your odds, compare to Pinnacle de-vig, get EV and ¼ Kelly.

matches.title: Match Predictions
matches.subtitle: Group-stage model probabilities, alongside market de-vig probabilities.
matches.noMarket: No market odds to compare yet
matches.knockoutTbdDesc: Knockout matchups are set after the group stage; no predictions before the draw.

groups.title: Advancement Odds
groups.subtitle: Each team's probability of finishing 1st / 2nd / qualifying as a best third.

value.title: EV / value calculator
value.subtitle: Compared by default to the fair market price (Pinnacle with the vig removed); an experimental model-probability mode is available — the two sources are never blended.
value.lineMismatchDesc: Your line differs from the Pinnacle main line. No cross-line interpolation, so no EV / value is computed.
value.approximateDesc: Whole lines can push (refund) and quarter lines split the stake — two-way market odds carry neither, so EV / stake are approximate.
value.noMarketForMatch: No market odds for this match yet; value cannot be computed.
value.errInvalidOdds: Converted decimal odds must be greater than 1 — please check your input.
value.calcByMarket: Computed from the fair market price
value.marketRefMainLine: Fair market probability at the main line {point} (reference)
value.calibrationNone: The model has no real-tournament validation yet (0 settled matches)
value.calibrationStatus: {n} matches settled: model Brier {mb} vs market {kb} (lower is better)
value.kellyLockedProgress: Calibration progress {n}/{total} — stake suggestions unlock after the model is validated on at least {total} settled matches (expected mid group stage)
value.kellyLockedFailed: Model calibration below the bar (Brier more than 10% behind the market) — stake suggestions stay locked
value.lineOutOfRange: This line is outside the model grid (1.5–4.5 in 0.25 steps)
value.noModelForMatch: No model prediction for this match yet; model mode unavailable.
value.per100Win: Per 100 staked you win {amount} on average
value.per100Lose: Per 100 staked you lose {amount} on average
value.breakevenMarket: Breakeven needs a {be} win rate; the vig-free market says {fair}
value.breakevenModel: Breakeven needs a {be} win rate; the model says {fair} (experimental)
value.nearFairNote: Still negative expected value — the vig is low, but it remains paid entertainment.
value.yourPriceIsBest: Your price is the best among tracked books
value.divergenceDisclaimer: A big divergence is NOT value — it usually means the model is wrong. Research comparison only. Click to prefill the calculator.

upset.tooltip: Large Elo gap, yet the underdog's not-lose probability is still meaningful.

footer.attribution: Elo data from eloratings.net, released under CC BY-SA 4.0.
footer.marketEfficiency: The model is experimental; closing market odds are usually the most accurate. Shown alongside the market for comparison only — not betting advice.
footer.responsibleBody: This tool is for entertainment and information only. Bet within your means and never with borrowed money. If you need help, contact your local problem-gambling resources.
footer.zhNamePending: Some team names are pending Chinese translation and shown in English for now.
footer.responsibleResources: Need help? In Ontario: ConnexOntario 1-866-531-2600 (19+). Please bet responsibly and within your means.
